headline: UFC champion Conor McGregor makes his comeback on Saturday. What does it mean for TKO stock?
summary: Former featherweight and lightweight champion Conor McGregor is making his return to UFC fighting (TKO). Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi is joined by Breaking News Reporter Jake Conley and Trustless Media founder Zack Guzman to discuss.

headline: TKO Group Holdings (TKO) Nears Its Q2 2026 Results, Is The 20% Discount Justified?
summary: TKO Group Holdings (TKO) is set to release its second quarter 2026 results after the market closes on Monday, August 3, 2026. The company will also host a same-day investor teleconference and business update. See our latest analysis for TKO Group Holdings. Recent trading has been softer for TKO Group Holdings, with the share price down 7.95% over the past 30 days and 9.07% year to date. However, longer term momentum remains positive, given the 10.54% 1 year total shareholder return and very...
